VoiceNote.title: Voice Note
VoiceNote.description: A voice note submitted by a user.

name.description: The name of the user who submitted the voice note (optional).

email.description: The email address of the user who submitted the voice note.

type.description: The type of message (audio or video).

createdAt.description: When the voice note was submitted.

Pitch.title: Pitch
Pitch.description: A podcast topic pitch submitted by a user.

name.description: The name of the user who submitted the pitch (optional).

email.description: The email address of the user who submitted the pitch.

/voice_notes/{noteId}.description: Collection of all submitted voice notes.

/pitches/{pitchId}.description: Collection of all submitted podcast pitches.
